DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

No appearances.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS MURPHY INVESTMENTS and BART MURPHY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED with 5 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges each element of each cause of action as to the moving defendant. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT DAVID WASSERMAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, heard on June 27, 2014. Judge Lillian K. Sing, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Continued To Aug-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian W. Franklin, Esq. of Archer Norris, (925-930-6600), for Murphy Investment and Bart Murphy, Defendants and moving parties.
Pamela Kong, Esq. of Sundeen Salinas & Pyle, (510-663-9240), for Eileen Duffy, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Defendant's counsel states in open court that during the June 27, 2014 hearing, Judge Quidachay chooses to hear this demurrer by himself and should be continued to the date when Judge Quidachay returns. The statement of the counsel is affirmed by the Judicial Extern David Adams. Judge Sing accepted the affirmation. DEFENDANTS MURPHY INVESTMENTS and BART MURPHY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to August 8, 2014 at 9:30am in Dept. 501. Parties waive the notice. Judge Lillian K. Sing, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
